summary: The file instructs to prepare for the onboarding of three new interns who will start on Monday. This includes the allocation of laptops, creation of email accounts, and arrangement of introductory meetings. Lisa has been assigned to oversee these tasks and the deadline for completion is the upcoming Friday.

tasks.description: Prepare for the onboarding of three new interns
Allocate laptops for the new interns
Create email accounts for the new interns
Arrange introductory meetings for the new interns
